title: Blaze Powder Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Blaze Powder, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1
body:
# Blaze Powder Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Blaze Powder, translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1

![Blaze Powder Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581e04e21b3a672ba0fb25a31ca9a51b1d90fe2e.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Blaze Powder Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.20 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Blaze Powder Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Blaze Powder Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
